label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 9

extraction.one_line_summary: CARUSO Damiano soloed to victory from the break on Alto Velefique after destroying it early on Alto Collado Venta Luisa, finishing 1:05 ahead of ROGLIČ.
tactical_patterns: YATES Adam initiated favorites' selection but ROGLIČ immediately countered solo, forcing himself to bridge rather than relying on teammates.
MAS Enric's acceleration dropped YATES but ROGLIČ alone could follow, revealing hierarchy within GC group before rest day.
BOUCHARD Geoffrey bridged solo from peloton to breakaway on long descent before Velefique, demonstrating value of descending during suppressed pace.
CARUSO Damiano attacked breakaway on penultimate climb rather than waiting for finale, exploiting psychological hesitation before biggest ascent.

rider_signals.CARUSO Damiano: positive: at 33 showed exceptional confidence attacking strongest climbers early rather than conserving for final ascent
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: responded solo to YATES attack without waiting for teammates, extended GC lead to 28 seconds over MAS
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: lost 2:10 to stage winner and now 2:07 behind ROGLIČ, significantly struggling on category one climbs
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: initiated decisive selection but couldn't follow MAS acceleration, showing aggressive intent but insufficient depth on sustained climbs
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: only rider to stay with ROGLIČ after his acceleration, consolidated second overall at 28 seconds
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: threw chain while chasing for polka dots, mechanical destroyed stage win and jersey ambitions
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: required nursemaiding from POELS and PADUN throughout stage, clearly compromised form
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: positive: bridged to YATES group and attacked again, showing persistent threat despite stage loss
rider_signals.BOUCHARD Geoffrey: positive: solo bridge from peloton to break on descent demonstrates exceptional tactical opportunism and descending skill
